span.p: Boundary A\nFormat: HTTP (URL ?category=...)\nLikely error: malformed query string

div.style: color: rgb(113, 63, 18) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Boundary B\nFormat: HTML (rendered RSC)\nLikely error: server timeout / 500

div.style: color: rgb(113, 63, 18) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Boundary C\nFormat: SQL via PostgREST (HTTPS + JWT)\nLikely error: 401 invalid key / RLS blocks read

div.style: color: rgb(113, 63, 18) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Boundary D\nFormat: JSON rows\nLikely error: schema drift (missing field) caught by assertEventShape
